name: Fleet Trooper Squad
text:
Add 5 Fleet Trooper miniatures.
This unit gains Indomitable. This unit has this keyword even if these miniatures are defeated.
This unit is in cohesion if all miniatures are within 1 of the unit leader instead of within 1/2. This unit has this rule even if these miniatures are defeated.
This unit cannot be Deployed or issued Orders using the Transport keyword.
